recommendations.title: Godzilla
recommendations.overview: Japan is thrown into a panic after several ships are sunk near Odo Island. An expedition to the island led by Dr. Kyohei Yamane soon discover something far more devastating than imagined in the form of a 50 meter tall monster whom the natives call Go

recommendations.title: Vampire Hunter D: Bloodlust
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Horror, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: D, a legendary dhampir competes with a motley family of bounty hunters to track down Charlotte Elbourne, a young woman who has seemingly been abducted by vampire nobleman Meier Link.

recommendations.title: Becky
recommendations.overview: A teenager's weekend at a lake house with her father takes a turn for the worse when a group of convicts wreaks havoc on their lives.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: The Beast from 20,000 Fathoms
recommendations.overview: The controlled explosion of an atomic bomb in the Arctic Circle awakens a frozen dinosaur that will wreak havoc in New York City.

recommendations.title: Frankenweenie
recommendations.overview: When young Victor's pet dog Sparky (who stars in Victor's home-made monster movies) is hit by a car, Victor decides to bring him back to life the only way he knows how. But when the bolt-necked "monster" wreaks havoc and terror in the hearts of Victo

recommendations.title: Invaders from Mars
recommendations.overview: A boy tries to stop aliens that have taken over his town and are brainwashing its inhabitants.
